LanguageData.Cascadia_Seattle.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->北部的企業大樓廢墟和被洪水淹沒的郊區
LanguageData.Cascadia_Vancouver.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->前英克雷科學家收復被摧毀的沿海城市
LanguageData.HHTools_BoneyardState.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->rebuilt ruins of pre-War Los Angeles
LanguageData.HHTools_Coloradum.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->科羅拉多河沿岸的軍團據點
LanguageData.HHTools_DayglowState.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->沿海地區因反應爐熔毀而傷痕累累
LanguageData.HHTools_Dine.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->橫跨峽谷地區復興的納瓦荷聯盟
LanguageData.HHTools_DogCityTwoSun.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->由馴獸師統治的殘酷軍團領地
LanguageData.HHTools_Flagstaff.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->凱撒的指揮與審判之座
LanguageData.HHTools_HiddenValley.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->莫哈韋沙漠的地下掩體綜合體
LanguageData.HHTools_Hopi.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->高原家園保留戰前的傳統
LanguageData.HHTools_LostHills.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->鋼鐵兄弟會的創始地堡
LanguageData.HHTools_MojaveTerritory.placeRules.rules: place_summary->新維加斯周圍的戰略沙漠邊境
LanguageData.HHTools_NavarroTerritory.placeRules.rule: place_summary->前英克雷基地轉變為 NCR 前哨基地
LanguageData.HHTools_NewCanaan.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->摩門教聚落轉變為貿易和信仰中心
LanguageData.HHTools_NewVegas.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->莫哈韋沙漠中的燈光與政治之城
LanguageData.HHTools_Phoenixia.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->根據軍團法重建的老鳳凰廢墟
LanguageData.HHTools_ReddingState.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->北部採礦殖民地轉變為國家
LanguageData.HHTools_ShadySands.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->capital of the New California Republic
LanguageData.HHTools_ShiState.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->舊金山倖存者的科學飛地
LanguageData.HHTools_Sonora.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->軍團佔領下的乾旱邊境
LanguageData.HHTools_TheBigCircle.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->連接 NCR 和新裡諾的主要商隊路線
LanguageData.HHTools_TheDivide.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->廢墟和風暴的破碎景觀
LanguageData.HHTools_TheGreatSaltLake.placeRules.rule: place_summary->古老湖床周圍的鹽灘和遺址
LanguageData.HHTools_TheHighway80.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->由商隊工會和僱傭兵維護的舊州際公路
LanguageData.HHTools_TheJetRoad.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->新里諾和埋骨地之間的毒販路線
LanguageData.HHTools_TheLittleLoop.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->NCR 城鎮之間的區域貿易線路
LanguageData.HHTools_TheLong15.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->重要的 NCR-Legacy 公路走廊
LanguageData.HHTools_Zion.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->鬱鬱蔥蔥的峽谷是倖存部落的家園
LanguageData.Texico_Chihuahua.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->塵土飛揚的交戰部落和掠奪者堡壘的山脈
LanguageData.Texico_RioGrande.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->貿易的河流邊境、襲擊者和被遺忘的前哨
LanguageData.Texico_Sinaloa.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->由化學領主和軍火走私者統治的南部荒原
LanguageData.Wasteland_CityRuins.placeRules.rulesStri: place_summary->倒塌的大都市，傾斜的摩天大樓，無人機和數字幽靈出沒
LanguageData.Wasteland_Desert.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->陽光照射下的熔融玻璃沙漠和掩埋的摩天大樓，拾荒者在那裡尋找文物
LanguageData.Wasteland_Forest.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->變異的鐵皮樹森林和生物發光真菌過度生長的軍事廢墟
